purpose: Provide a TL;DR for busy readers — the essential facts, key tension, and bottom line in under 150 words.
writingRules: Maximum 150 words — every word must carry weight
Answer: what happened, why it matters, what's at stake
No citations in the summary — those go in the evidence section
Write last, display first — summarize what the story actually says
Must be understandable without reading the rest of the story
seoRules: Meta description should be derived from the executive summary
Primary keyword must appear in the first 50 words
Summary should be structured as paragraph not bullet list for featured snippet
